merge.diff:
diff --git a/src/click/core.py b/src/click/core.py
index 666ad68..352e475 100644
--- a/src/click/core.py
+++ b/src/click/core.py
@@ -228,6 +228,14 @@ class Context:
         value is not set, it defaults to the value from the parent
         context. ``Command.show_default`` overrides this default for the
         specific command.
+    :param validate_nesting: If enabled, closing this context while any
+        child contexts created through :meth:`_make_sub_context` are
+        still open raises a ``RuntimeError``. Child contexts created
+        through :meth:`_make_sub_context` inherit this setting from
+        their parent. Defaults to ``False``.
+
+    .. versionchanged:: 8.2
+        Added the ``validate_nesting`` parameter.
 
     .. versionchanged:: 8.2
         The ``protected_args`` attribute is deprecated and will be removed in
@@ -280,6 +288,7 @@ class Context:
         token_normalize_func: t.Callable[[str], str] | None = None,
         color: bool | None = None,
         show_default: bool | None = None,
+        validate_nesting: bool = False,
     ) -> None:
         #: the parent context or `None` if none exists.
         self.parent = parent
@@ -432,6 +441,17 @@ class Context:
         self._parameter_source: dict[str, ParameterSource] = {}
         self._exit_stack = ExitStack()
 
+        #: Controls whether child contexts created through
+        #: :meth:`_make_sub_context` must be closed before this context
+        #: is closed. Child contexts inherit this setting.
+        #:
+        #: .. versionadded:: 8.2
+        self.validate_nesting = validate_nesting
+        #: Child contexts created through :meth:`_make_sub_context`
+        #: while :attr:`validate_nesting` is enabled, tracked here until
+        #: they are closed.
+        self._open_child_contexts: list[Context] = []
+
     @property
     def protected_args(self) -> list[str]:
         import warnings
@@ -606,11 +626,32 @@ class Context:
         """Invoke all close callbacks registered with
         :meth:`call_on_close`, and exit all context managers entered
         with :meth:`with_resource`.
+
+        :raises RuntimeError: If :attr:`validate_nesting` is enabled
+            and this context is closed while any child contexts
+            created through :meth:`_make_sub_context` are still open.
+
+        .. versionchanged:: 8.2
+            Raises a ``RuntimeError`` if ``validate_nesting`` is
+            enabled and child contexts are still open.
         """
+        if self.validate_nesting and self._open_child_contexts:
+            open_names = ", ".join(
+                repr(child.info_name) for child in self._open_child_contexts
+            )
+            raise RuntimeError(
+                f"Tried to close context {self.info_name!r} while it still"
+                f" has open child contexts: {open_names}. Child contexts"
+                " must be closed before their parent context."
+            )
+
         self._exit_stack.close()
         # In case the context is reused, create a new exit stack.
         self._exit_stack = ExitStack()
 
+        if self.parent is not None and self in self.parent._open_child_contexts:
+            self.parent._open_child_contexts.remove(self)
+
     @property
     def command_path(self) -> str:
         """The computed command path.  This is used for the ``usage``
@@ -705,7 +746,8 @@ class Context:
 
         .. versionchanged:: 8.2
             Force closing of callbacks registered with
-            :meth:`call_on_close` before exiting the CLI.
+            :meth:`call_on_close` before exiting the CLI. This also
+            closes resources registered with :meth:`with_resource`.
         """
         self.close()
         raise Exit(code)
@@ -728,7 +770,17 @@ class Context:
 
         :meta private:
         """
-        return type(self)(command, info_name=command.name, parent=self)
+        child = type(self)(
+            command,
+            info_name=command.name,
+            parent=self,
+            validate_nesting=self.validate_nesting,
+        )
+
+        if self.validate_nesting:
+            self._open_child_contexts.append(child)
+
+        return child
 
     @t.overload
     def invoke(
diff --git a/src/click/shell_completion.py b/src/click/shell_completion.py
index 6fd9e54..2cd54ff 100644
--- a/src/click/shell_completion.py
+++ b/src/click/shell_completion.py
@@ -544,44 +544,51 @@ def _resolve_context(
     :param args: List of complete args before the incomplete value.
     """
     ctx_args["resilient_parsing"] = True
-    ctx = cli.make_context(prog_name, args.copy(), **ctx_args)
-    args = ctx._protected_args + ctx.args
+    with cli.make_context(prog_name, args.copy(), **ctx_args) as ctx:
+        ctx.validate_nesting = False
+        args = ctx._protected_args + ctx.args
 
-    while args:
-        command = ctx.command
+        while args:
+            command = ctx.command
 
-        if isinstance(command, Group):
-            if
